---
title: "I graduated from Emory University!"
description: "I am excited to announce that I have completed my Bachelor's degree in Applied Mathematics and Statistics at Emory University. "
author:
  - name: Jiuru Lyu
    url: https://jrlyu.github.io/
date: 05-11-2026
draft: false 
---

Today, I am excited to announce that I have completed my Bachelor's degree in Applied Mathematics and Statistics at Emory University. It has been an incredible journey filled with learning, growth, and unforgettable experiences. I am grateful for the support of my family, friends, professors, and mentors who have guided me throughout this academic journey. As I embark on the next chapter of my life, I look forward to applying the knowledge and skills I have gained to make a positive impact in the world. Thank you to everyone who has been a part of this journey with me!
